nasb.text: Jacob said, “No, please, if now I have found favor in your sight, then take my present from my hand, for I see your face as one sees the face of God, and you have received me favorably.

esv.text: Jacob said, “No, please, if I have found favor in your sight, then accept my present from my hand. For I have seen your face, which is like seeing the face of God, and you have accepted me.

cnv.text: 雅各說：“請不要這樣，我若得你的喜悅，就求你從我手裡收下這些禮物吧；因為我看見了你的面，就好像見了　神的面；你實在恩待了我。

ccb.text: 雅各说：“不，你若赏脸，就请收下！我见了你的面就像见了上帝的面，因为你这样善侍我。

csbs.text: 雅各说：“不，如果我在你眼前蒙恩，就请你从我手中收下礼物；因为我见了你的面，就像见了神的面，而你也悦纳了我。
